displayName: New Zealand – Post Study Work Visa
shortDescription: Immigration NZ · After NZ study · Open work · Qualification-based

policyAlert.summary: Confirm current Post Study Work Visa fee (NZD $700 approx) on immigration.govt.nz. Must apply within qualification completion timeframe.

alert.title: Apply after eligible NZ qualification
alert.body: Must complete eligible qualification in New Zealand. Visa length depends on study level and where studied—verify before promising duration.

about.label: Description
about.value: Work visa for international graduates who completed eligible qualification in New Zealand. Allows open work for employer at any skill level for qualification-based duration.

about.label: Eligible applicants
about.value: Completed eligible NZ qualification · Studied in NZ minimum required time · Applied within specified period after study · Good character · Genuine intent to work in NZ

about.label: Duration rules
about.value: 1–3 years depending on qualification level and study location ( Auckland vs outside). Verify current INZ rules.

about.label: After approval
about.value: Work freely in NZ. Pathway to Skilled Migrant or Green List residence with NZ work experience.

redFlagsBanner: If qualification not eligible for post-study work, explore alternative work visa—do not submit ineligible application.

redFlags.title: Qualification not eligible
redFlags.description: Course level or provider not meeting post-study work criteria.

redFlags.title: Insufficient NZ study time
redFlags.description: Did not complete required months physically in NZ.
redFlags.fix: Track attendance and study duration requirements

redFlags.title: Prior post-study work used
redFlags.description: Already held post-study work for same qualification level.
redFlags.fix: Assess if second visa possible—usually not

redFlags.title: Student visa compliance issues
redFlags.fix: Maintain student visa conditions throughout study

redFlags.title: Incomplete completion evidence
redFlags.description: Missing official completion letter from provider.

faqs.q: Can we guarantee post-study work visa?
faqs.a: No. Most eligible graduates approved but never guarantee.
1–3 years based on qualification level and study location—verify INZ rules.
Verify current rules—may need to be in NZ on eligible visa.
Yes—open work at any skill level.
NZ work experience supports Skilled Migrant or Green List pathways.
Partner may apply for work visa based on relationship—assess separately.
After qualification completion within INZ specified timeframe.
Generally limited—verify if further study qualifies for new visa.

compliance: Client service agreement and consent must be on file before submission
Never guarantee visa or immigration approval; use approved-language only
Fee quotes must separate consultancy, government, and third-party costs
proTips: Verify post-study work eligibility at enrolment
Track completion date and application window
Plan SMC/Green List during post-study work

changelog.author: Service Library
changelog.summary: Initial NZ Post Study Work Visa counselor content.

staffNotes.author: Documentation team
staffNotes.text: Confirm qualification level and Auckland/outside Auckland study for correct visa duration quote.

quiz.question: Post Study Work Visa requires:
options: Eligible qualification completed in New Zealand

quiz.question: Pathway after post-study work:
options: Skilled Migrant or Green List residence

dos: Plan residence pathway during work visa
donts: Do not apply with ineligible qualification
Do not promise visa duration without checking rules
mistakes: Wrong duration quoted for Auckland study
